channel.title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) (hpe).

item.title: CVE-2026-44877 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Unauthenticated Remote Disclosure of Cryptographic Secrets
item.description: An unauthenticated remote disclosure vulnerability has been identified in HPE Networking Instant On 1830, 1930, and 1960 Switches. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated remote threat actor to access sensitive cr…

item.title: CVE-2026-44871 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Command Injection Vulnerabilities in Command Line Interface (CLI) Service Accessed by PAPI Protocol of AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems
item.description: Command injection vulnerabilities exist in the command line interface (CLI) service accessed by the PAPI protocol of AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. Successful exploitation of these vulnerabilities could allow an authenticated remote attacker to…

item.title: CVE-2026-44873 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Insufficient Session Invalidation on User Account Deactivation in AOS-8 Operating System
item.description: A session management vulnerability in AOS-8 allows previously authenticated users to retain network access after their accounts are administratively disabled. Existing sessions are not invalidated when credentials are revoked, enabling continued acce…

item.title: CVE-2026-44874 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Authenticated Arbitrary File Download via AOS-10 Web-Based Management Interface
item.description: A vulnerability exists in the web-based management interface of an AOS-10 Gateway that could allow an authenticated remote attacker to access sensitive files on the underlying operating system. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could resu…

item.title: CVE-2026-44872 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Arbitrary File Upload via Command Injection in AOS-8 AND AOS-10 Web-Based Management Interface
item.description: A command injection vulnerability exists in the web-based management interface of AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. Successful exploitation could allow an authenticated remote attacker to place arbitrary files on the underlying filesystem of the af…

item.title: CVE-2026-44870 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Command Injection Vulnerabilities in Command Line Interface (CLI) Service Accessed by PAPI Protocol of AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems
item.description: Command injection vulnerabilities exist in the command line interface (CLI) service accessed by the PAPI protocol of AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. Successful exploitation of these vulnerabilities could allow an authenticated remote attacker to…

item.title: CVE-2026-44869 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Command Injection Vulnerabilities in the Web-Based Management Interface of AOS-8 and AOS-10
item.description: Command injection vulnerabilities exist in the web-based management interface of AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. Successful exploitation of these vulnerabilities could allow an authenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the un…

item.title: CVE-2026-44868 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Command Injection Vulnerabilities in the Web-Based Management Interface of AOS-8 and AOS-10
item.description: Command injection vulnerabilities exist in the web-based management interface of AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. Successful exploitation of these vulnerabilities could allow an authenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the un…

item.title: CVE-2026-44867 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Command Injection Vulnerabilities in the Web-Based Management Interface of AOS-8 and AOS-10
item.description: Command injection vulnerabilities exist in the web-based management interface of AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. Successful exploitation of these vulnerabilities could allow an authenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the un…

item.title: CVE-2026-44866 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Command Injection Vulnerabilities in the Web-Based Management Interface of AOS-8 and AOS-10
item.description: Command injection vulnerabilities exist in the web-based management interface of AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. Successful exploitation of these vulnerabilities could allow an authenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the un…

item.title: CVE-2026-44865 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Command Injection Vulnerabilities in the Web-Based Management Interface of AOS-8 and AOS-10
item.description: Command injection vulnerabilities exist in the web-based management interface of AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. Successful exploitation of these vulnerabilities could allow an authenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the un…

item.title: CVE-2026-44864 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Remote Code Execution via SQL Injection in AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems
item.description: SQL injection vulnerabilities exist in several underlying service components accessible through the AOS-8 and AOS-10 command-line interface and management protocol. An authenticated attacker with administrative privileges could exploit these vulnerab…

item.title: CVE-2026-44863 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Remote Code Execution via SQL Injection in AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems
item.description: SQL injection vulnerabilities exist in several underlying service components accessible through the AOS-8 and AOS-10 command-line interface and management protocol. An authenticated attacker with administrative privileges could exploit these vulnerab…

item.title: CVE-2026-44862 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Remote Code Execution via SQL Injection in AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems
item.description: SQL injection vulnerabilities exist in several underlying service components accessible through the AOS-8 and AOS-10 command-line interface and management protocol. An authenticated attacker with administrative privileges could exploit these vulnerab…

item.title: CVE-2026-44861 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Remote Code Execution via SQL Injection in AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems
item.description: SQL injection vulnerabilities exist in several underlying service components accessible through the AOS-8 and AOS-10 command-line interface and management protocol. An authenticated attacker with administrative privileges could exploit these vulnerab…

item.title: CVE-2026-44860 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Remote Code Execution via SQL Injection in AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems
item.description: SQL injection vulnerabilities exist in several underlying service components accessible through the AOS-8 and AOS-10 command-line interface and management protocol. An authenticated attacker with administrative privileges could exploit these vulnerab…

item.title: CVE-2026-44859 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Stack-Based Buffer Overflow in PAPI Services
item.description: Stack-based buffer overflow vulnerabilities exist in several underlying management service components accessed through the command-line interface of the AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. An authenticated attacker with administrative privileges coul…

item.title: CVE-2026-44858 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Stack-Based Buffer Overflow in PAPI Services
item.description: Stack-based buffer overflow vulnerabilities exist in several underlying management service components accessed through the command-line interface of the AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. An authenticated attacker with administrative privileges coul…

item.title: CVE-2026-44857 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Stack-Based Buffer Overflow in PAPI Services
item.description: Stack-based buffer overflow vulnerabilities exist in several underlying management service components accessed through the command-line interface of the AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. An authenticated attacker with administrative privileges coul…

item.title: CVE-2026-44856 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Stack-Based Buffer Overflow in PAPI Services
item.description: Stack-based buffer overflow vulnerabilities exist in several underlying management service components accessed through the command-line interface of the AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. An authenticated attacker with administrative privileges coul…

item.title: CVE-2026-44855 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Stack-Based Buffer Overflow in PAPI Services
item.description: Stack-based buffer overflow vulnerabilities exist in several underlying management service components accessed through the command-line interface of the AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. An authenticated attacker with administrative privileges coul…

item.title: CVE-2026-44854 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Remote Code Execution via Arbitrary File Write in AOS-8 and AOS-10 Web-Based Management Interface
item.description: Command injection vulnerabilities exist in the web-based management interface of AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. Successful exploitation could allow an authenticated remote attacker to upload arbitrary files to the underlying operating system, po…

item.title: CVE-2026-44853 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Remote Code Execution via Arbitrary File Write in AOS-8 and AOS-10 Web-Based Management Interface
item.description: Command injection vulnerabilities exist in the web-based management interface of AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. Successful exploitation could allow an authenticated remote attacker to upload arbitrary files to the underlying operating system, po…

item.title: CVE-2026-44852 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Remote Code Execution via Arbitrary File Overwrite in the AOS-8 and AOS-10 Web-Based Management Interface
item.description: An authenticated remote code execution vulnerability exists in the AOS-8 and AOS-10 web-based management interface. A vulnerability in the certificate download functionality could allow an authenticated remote attacker to overwrite arbitrary files on…

item.title: CVE-2026-23827 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution via Heap Buffer Overflow in Network Management Service
item.description: A heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in a Network management service of AOS-8 and AOS-10 that could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to achieve remote code execution. Successful exploitation could allow an unauthenticated attacke…

item.title: CVE-2026-23826 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Denial of Service in AOS-8 Network Management Service
item.description: A vulnerability in a network management service of AOS-8 Operating System could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to exploit this vulnerability by sending specially crafted network packets to the affected device, potentially resulting in a den…

item.title: CVE-2026-23825 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Denial-of-Service via Crafted Messages in a Network Protocol Handling Component
item.description: Vulnerabilities exist in a protocol-handling component of AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. An unauthenticated attacker could exploit these vulnerabilities by sending specially crafted network messages to the affected service. Due to insufficient i…

item.title: CVE-2026-23824 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Denial-of-Service via Crafted Messages in a Network Protocol Handling Component
item.description: Vulnerabilities exist in a protocol-handling component of AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. An unauthenticated attacker could exploit these vulnerabilities by sending specially crafted network messages to the affected service. Due to insufficient i…

item.title: CVE-2026-23823 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Command Injection leads to RCE in AOS-10 CLI Command
item.description: A vulnerability in the command line interface of Access Points running AOS-10 could allow an authenticated remote attacker to perform command injection. Successful exploitation could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the underlying o…

item.title: CVE-2026-23822 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Unauthenticated XML External Entity Injection in AOS-8 Instant allows Denial of Service
item.description: A vulnerability in the XML handling component of AOS-8 DHCP services could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to trigger a denial-of-service condition. Successful exploitation could allow an attacker to cause excessive resource consumption upon…

item.title: CVE-2026-23821 · 7.2 HIGH — Inconsistent input filtering allows Authenticated Command Injection in AOS-10 CLI
item.description: A vulnerability in the configuration processing logic of Access Points running AOS-10 could allow an authenticated remote attacker to execute system commands under certain pre-existing conditions. Successful exploitation could allow an attacker to ex…

item.title: CVE-2026-23820 · 7.2 HIGH — Inconsistent input filtering allows Authenticated Command Injection in AOS-8 Instant and AOS-10 CLI
item.description: A vulnerability in the command line interface of Access Points running AOS-10 and AOS-8 Instant could allow an authenticated remote attacker to execute system commands in a restricted shell environment. Successful exploitation could allow an attacker…

item.title: CVE-2026-23819 · 8.8 HIGH — Error in SSID Processing allows Stored XSS in Web Management Interface
item.description: A vulnerability in the web-based management interface of Access Points running AOS-10 and AOS-8 Instant could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary JavaScript code in a victim's browser within the same local network. Successfu…

item.title: CVE-2026-23818 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Open Redirect Vulnerability in HPE Aruba Networking Private 5G Core On-Prem
item.description: A vulnerability has been identified in the graphical user interface (GUI) of HPE Aruba Networking Private 5G Core On-Prem that could allow an attacker to abuse an open redirect vulnerability in the login flow using a crafted URL. Successful exploitat…

item.title: CVE-2026-23817 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Open Redirect allows URL Manipulation in Web Interface
item.description: A vulnerability in the web-based management interface of AOS-CX Switches could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to redirect users to an arbitrary URL.

item.title: CVE-2026-23816 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Command Injection found in admin AOS-CX CLI command
item.description: A vulnerability in the command line interface of AOS-CX Switches could allow an authenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the underlying operating system.

item.title: CVE-2026-23815 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Command Injection found in AOS-CX Administrative CLI Command
item.description: A vulnerability in a custom binary used in AOS-CX Switches' CLI could allow an authenticated remote attacker with high privileges to perform command injection. Successful exploitation could allow an attacker to execute unauthorized commands.

item.title: CVE-2026-23814 · 8.8 HIGH — Authenticated Command Injection found in AOS-CX CLI Command
item.description: A vulnerability in the command parameters of a certain AOS-CX CLI command could allow a low-privilege authenticated remote attacker to inject malicious commands resulting in unwanted behavior.

item.title: CVE-2026-23813 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Authentication Bypass in Web Interface allows Unauthenticated Admin Password Reset
item.description: A vulnerability has been identified in the web-based management interface of AOS-CX switches that could potentially allow an unauthenticated remote actor to circumvent existing authentication controls. In some cases this could enable resetting the ad…

item.title: CVE-2026-23812 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Security Boundary Bypass via Routing Node Impersonation
item.description: A vulnerability has been identified where an attacker connecting to an access point as a standard wired or wireless client can impersonate a gateway by leveraging an address-based spoofing technique. Successful exploitation enables the redirection of…

item.title: CVE-2026-23811 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Unauthorized Bi-Directional Traffic Interception via L2/L3 Manipulation
item.description: A vulnerability in the client isolation mechanism may allow an attacker to bypass Layer 2 (L2) communication restrictions between clients and redirect traffic at Layer 3 (L3). In addition to bypassing policy enforcement, successful exploitation - whe…

item.title: CVE-2026-23810 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Cross-BSSID GTK Re-encryption and Traffic Injection
item.description: A vulnerability in the packet processing logic may allow an authenticated attacker to craft and transmit a malicious Wi-Fi frame that causes an Access Point (AP) to classify the frame as group-addressed traffic and re-encrypt it using the Group Tempo…

item.title: CVE-2026-23809 · 5.4 MEDIUM — MAC Address Spoofing leads to Inter-BSSID Isolation Bypass Resulting in Traffic Redirection
item.description: A technique has been identified that adapts a known port-stealing method to Wi-Fi environments that use multiple BSSIDs. By leveraging the relationship between BSSIDs and their associated virtual ports, an attacker could potentially bypass inter-BSSI…

item.title: CVE-2026-23808 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Client Isolation Bypass via GTK Manipulation
item.description: A vulnerability has been identified in a standardized wireless roaming protocol that could enable a malicious actor to install an attacker-controlled Group Temporal Key (GTK) on a client device. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could all…

item.title: CVE-2026-23601 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Frame Injection via Shared GTK Allows Traffic Spoofing and Client Compromise
item.description: A vulnerability has been identified in the wireless encryption handling of Wi-Fi transmissions. A malicious actor can generate shared-key authenticated transmissions containing targeted payloads while impersonating the identity of a primary BSSID.Suc…

item.title: CVE-2026-23600 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: A remote authentication bypass vulnerability exists in HPE AutoPass License Server (APLS).

item.title: CVE-2026-23599 · 7.8 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability in HPE Aruba Networking Clear Pass Policy Manager OnGuard for Linux
item.description: A local privilege-escalation vulnerability has been discovered in the HPE Aruba Networking ClearPass OnGuard Software for Linux. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could allow a local attacker to achieve arbitrary code execution with root…

item.title: CVE-2026-23598 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Unauthenticated Information Disclosure in application API allows sensitive system information exposure
item.description: Vulnerabilities in the API error handling of an HPE Aruba Networking 5G Core server API could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to obtain sensitive information. Successful exploitation could allow an attacker to access details such as user acc…

item.title: CVE-2026-23597 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Unauthenticated Information Disclosure in application API allows sensitive system information exposure
item.description: Vulnerabilities in the API error handling of an HPE Aruba Networking 5G Core server API could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to obtain sensitive information. Successful exploitation could allow an attacker to access details such as user acc…

item.title: CVE-2026-23596 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Unauthenticated Improper Access Control in management API allows unauthorized service disruption
item.description: A vulnerability in the management API of the affected product could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to trigger service restarts. Successful exploitation could allow an attacker to disrupt services and negatively impact system availability.
